title: Sales Manager
description:
Job Responsibilities

  • Lead, manage, and motivate the sales team to achieve individual and team sales targets

  • Attend to new sales enquiries, prepare quotations, and drive development of new products and markets

  • Develop, monitor, and review monthly sales pipelines and forecasts

  • Consolidate and contribute to group sales reports

  • Provide pricing guidance for RFQs and conduct product and sales training for the team

  • Manage key suppliers, including product sourcing, pricing, and technical support coordination

  • Plan and conduct customer visits for both local and overseas markets; prepare trip and visit reports

  • Attend and represent the company at business networking events, seminars, and exhibitions

  • Review subsidiary sales pipeline meeting minutes and provide guidance where necessary

  • Oversee order processing, delivery follow-ups, and market expansion for assigned countries

  • Drive cross-selling of all company products across customer accounts

  • Coach, guide, and evaluate sales team performance

  • Perform any other ad-hoc duties as assigned by management

Job Requirements

  • Degree in Engineering, Business, or a related discipline

  • Minimum 8 years of sales experience, with proven team leadership experience

  • Prior experience in the gas industry or related industrial sectors is strongly preferred

  • Strong leadership, communication, negotiation, and presentation skills

  • Strategic mindset with hands-on sales capability

  • Willingness to travel locally and overseas

  • Possess a valid driving licence

  • Transport and cash card allowances will be provided

  • Singaporean only may apply

Benefits

  • Annual Wage Supplement (AWS)

  • Variable Bonus

  • Outpatient medical 

  • Transport Allowance

  • Travel Allowance

postedCompany.description:
SING SWEE BEE ENTERPRISE PTE LTD was set up in 1978. Its primary activity was in general export business. Since then, The Company is involved in trading of industrial gases and related products in Singapore and East Malaysia markets.

Over the years, the Company has consolidated its position in the market. This is achieved by securing a list of overseas agencies and expanding the customer base to Asian countries as well as other parts of the world. In 1992, Sing Swee Bee enterprise Pte Ltd was incorporated to reinforce its focus on quality improvement of products and to create a corporate image, in view of the expansion, the company is relocated to our company-owned premises at No.6 Attap Valley Road, Singapore 759906, in order to house the activities under one roof.

Today, our company is proud to establish ourselves as one of the major stockist of gas cylinders in S.E.ASIA and also a leading supplier of refrigerants in Singapore. In addition, the company was awarded with the ISO 9001 certification in 2000, for our excellent products quality and outstanding service. In the years to come, with our sound management and infrastructure base, we hope to be the main supplier of related products to many industries.
postedCompany.name: SING SWEE BEE ENTERPRISE PTE LTD
